description: CompositionGreen T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron Does your little one belong to that league of kids who are definitely upto some mischief if they are quiet? Then there's no better way to flaunt that naughty attitude in absolute style that with this tantra t-shirt. Team this cotton t-shirt with denim trousers or shorts and floaters, and feel proud of that naughty streak in your little one.
